title: Tinkers' Melting: The Aether
description: Adds Tinkers' Construct Smeltery recipes for The Aether
body:
Adds more [Tinker's Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) Smeltery recipes for [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)

- Chainmail Gloves can be melted into 1 ingot and 3 nuggets worth of Molten Iron (120mb, half the result of Chainmail Boots).
- Iron Gloves can be melted into 2 ingots worth of Molten Iron (180mb).
- Golden Gloves can be melted into 2 ingots worth of Molten Gold (180mb).
- Diamond Gloves can be melted into 2 gems worth of Molten Diamond (200mb, requires Blazing Blood).
- Netherite Gloves can be melted into 1 ingot worth of Molten Netherite (90mb, requires Blazing Blood).

Because Tinker's Construct is cool and they coded everything to use data packs, you will automatically get proportionally less metal from damaged items.

Made for Forge 1.20.1 but probably works on other versions depending on how they're structuring things.

This project is made available under the MIT License, feel free to include this in your modpacks!
